                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (8 techs) --

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (13 techs) --

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tac_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tac_air_1945
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tac_air_1950
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

# tac_air_1960
#   year=1960 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tac_air_1970
#   year=1970 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tac_air_1980
#   year=1980 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tac_air_1990
#   year=1990 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

tbm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { improved_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # electronic_mechanical_engineering - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mechanical_computing - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_encryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_decryption - 1938

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1937 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1965 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1965 = yes

        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1975 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1975 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1990 = yes
        }
    }

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fortification_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # coastal_fort_tech_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { coastal_fort_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_machine_tools - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_machine_tools }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_machine_tools = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry - 1936
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_silos - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_silos }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_silos = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_refining - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_refining = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # synth_oil_experiments - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = synth_oil_experiments }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { synth_oil_experiments = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # construction1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1970 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # batch_production_3 - 1970
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = batch_production_3 }
                NOT = { has_tech = mass_production_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # mass_production_3 - 1970

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mass_production_3 }
                NOT = { has_tech = batch_production_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                NOT = { has_tech = improved_oil_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1985 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1985 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # batch_production_5 - 1985
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = batch_production_5 }
                NOT = { has_tech = mass_production_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1985 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { batch_production_5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mass_production_5 - 1985
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mass_production_5 }
                NOT = { has_tech = batch_production_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1985 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) --

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { naval_radar_1950 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (16 techs) --

# rocket_artillery
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery4
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# improved_rocket_engines
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# ICBM
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# MRBM
#   year=1962 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# SRBM
#   year=1962 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1962 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1962 = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # rocket_engines - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_engines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_engines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_rockets_rocket_bomber - 1944

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_rocket_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 - 1944

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1990 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_air
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

tbm_grant_land_artillery = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1939 = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1940 = yes

tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # gw_artillery - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gw_artillery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { gw_artillery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # interwar_artillery - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = interwar_artillery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { interwar_artillery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { SPAA_1980_air_attack_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

# -- LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) --

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

        }
        # infantry_weapons - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1978 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons_5 - 1978
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1978 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# -- LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (8 techs) --

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # gwtank - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # gwtank_chassis - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1962 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1962 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1972 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1972 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1982 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
