tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_trucks - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { tech_trucks = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # motorised_infantry - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { motorised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # motorized_infantry - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorized_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { motorized_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_art

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "La Resistance"
        }
        # armored_car1 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "La Resistance"
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / CARRIERS (16 techs) --

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1960
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1970
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# semi_modern_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1980
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1990
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # early_carrier - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / DESTROYERS (23 techs) --

# early_destroyer
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_destroyer
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_destroyer
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sonar
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_sonar
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# good_sonar
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# semi_modern_ship_hull_light
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# even_more_modern_depth_charges
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# semi_modern_sonar
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_ship_hull_light
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# super_modern_depth_charges
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_sonar
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # early_destroyer - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (5 techs) --

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1964 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1964 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1965 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1965 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1966 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1966 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1968 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1968 = yes
        }
        if = {

            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # landing_ship_dock - 1990
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = landing_ship_dock }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            }
            set_technology = { landing_ship_dock = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / SUBMARINES (19 techs) --

# early_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine_japan
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1960
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1970
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1980
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1990
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

tbm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1990 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # early_submarine - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_sub_1970 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # nuclear_sub_1980 - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1980 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_sub_1980 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
